s1.ptxt: Run engine at idle speed with A/C ON for 10 minutes.
Recover refrigerant from A/C system using recovery and recycling equipment referring to “Recovery” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
Disconnect magnet clutch lead wire connector (1).
Disconnect discharge hose (2) and suction hose (3) from A/C compressor (4).

attention3.ptxt: Cap open fittings immediately to keep moisture out of the system.

s1.ptxt: Remove compressor mounting bolts (5), and then remove A/C compressor (4) from its bracket.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: If A/C compressor is replaced, pour new compressor oil referring to “Replenishing Compressor Oil” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
Apply compressor oil to new O-ring of discharge hose and liquid pipe.
Tighten compressor mounting bolts in numerical order (“1” through “3”) as shown in the figure.
Evacuate and charge A/C system referring to “Evacuation” and “Charge” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
